heading: Quarters allowances
label: 3657a Quarters allowances
notes: References in TextFor effective date of this section, referred to in subsec. (b)(2), see , set out below.section 2 of Pub. L. 98–600

Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 98–600, § 298 Stat. 3146Oct. 30, 1984“The amendments made by this Act [enacting this section] shall take effect on , and shall apply with respect to utility costs incurred, and rent payable for any period beginning, on or after that date.”October 1, 1984

Ex. Ord. No. 12520. Quarters Allowance to Department of Defense Employees in PanamaEx. Ord. No. 12520, , 50 F.R. 25683, provided:June 19, 1985By the authority vested in me as President by the Constitution and the laws of the United States of America, including section 1217a of the Panama Canal Act of 1979 (), it is hereby ordered as follows:22 U.S.C. 3657a1. The Secretary of Defense is authorized to prescribe the regulations referred to in section 1217a of the Panama Canal Act of 1979 [], relating to quarters allowances.Section22 U.S.C. 3657a. 2. The regulations prescribed under Section 1 shall be consistent with Article VII(4) of the Agreement in Implementation of Article IV of the Panama Canal Treaty and with all other relevant provisions of the Panama Canal Treaty and related agreements.SecRonald Reagan.
amendments: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 98–600, § 298 Stat. 3146Oct. 30, 1984“The amendments made by this Act [enacting this section] shall take effect on , and shall apply with respect to utility costs incurred, and rent payable for any period beginning, on or after that date.”October 1, 1984

children.text: “employee” means an individual serving in a position in the Department of Defense whose permanent duty station is in the area which, before , was known as the Canal Zone.October 1, 1979

any employee who is a citizen of the United States and who, before , was employed by the Panama Canal Company, the Canal Zone Government, or any other agency, in the area then known as the Canal Zone; andOctober 1, 1979
any other employee who is a citizen of the United States and who (before, on, or after the effective date of this section) is or was recruited within the United States;

children.label: A
children.text: the actual expenses for rent and utilities incurred by the employee during such period while occupying quarters other than Government owned or leased quarters; or

children.label: B
children.text: the maximum amount which would be authorized for such employee with respect to such period under the Department of State Standardized Regulations (Government Civilians, Foreign Areas) if such employee were covered by those regulations;
the estimated total cost of rent and utilities which the employee would have been charged if Government owned or leased quarters had been provided on a rental basis during such period.

children.heading: Inapplicability of election undersection 3652(b) of this title
children.label: d Inapplicability of election undersection 3652(b) of this title
children.text: The provisions of this section shall apply without regard to whether any election by the Department of Defense under is then in effect.section 3652(b) of this title
